headline: POTTERY BARN KIDS LAUNCHES NEW COLLABORATION WITH BRIA HAMMEL
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, June 25, 2026--Pottery Barn Kids, portfolio brand of Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (NYSE: WSM), the world’s largest digital-first, design-led and sustainable home retailer, announced today a new collaboration with popular interior designer, Bria Hammel. Known for her nationally recognized interior design firm and bestselling design book, Hammel has built a loyal following through her ability to blend classic design principles with fresh, family-focused functionality.
